theme: Git asoslari — init, commit, branch, merge, .gitignore (to'liq kun)

tasks.title: Repo yarat (git init)
tasks.why: Har git loyiha 'git init' bilan boshlanadi — .git papkasi yaratiladi.
steps: Loyiha papkasi yaratib, repo qil:  mkdir -p project && cd project && git init

tasks.title: Kimligingni sozla (config)
tasks.why: Commit kim tomonidan qilinganini git bilishi kerak.

tasks.title: Faylni kuzatuvga ol (add)
tasks.why: git add — faylni staging'ga qo'yadi (commitga tayyorlaydi).

tasks.title: Tarmoq yarat (branch)
steps: project ичида yangi tarmoq:  git branch feature

tasks.title: Birlashtir (merge)
tasks.why: Branch'да ishlab, asosiyga merge qilish — jamoa oqimi.
steps: feat.txt yarat, add, commit:  echo hi > feat.txt && git add feat.txt && git commit -m feat

tasks.title: Faylni yashir (.gitignore)
tasks.check: cd $LAB/project && grep -q secret .gitignore && ! git status --porcelain | grep -q secret.txt

tasks.title: O'zgarishni ko'r (diff)
tasks.why: git diff — commit qilinmagan o'zgarishlarni ko'rsatadi.
steps: README.md ga yangi qator qo'sh:  echo 'yangi qator' >> README.md
tasks.expect: README.md da commit qilinmagan o'zgarish bor

tasks.title: Day-1 tuzilma + commit
tasks.why: Day-1 papka tuzilmasi + git: loyihani tartibli qilib commit qil.
steps: project ичида:  mkdir -p src docs && echo 'kod' > src/main.sh && echo 'hujjat' > docs/readme.md
Hammasini commit qil:  git add . && git commit -m 'tuzilma'
tasks.expect: src/ va docs/ git'ga commit qilingan

tasks.title: Day-8 skript + git
tasks.why: Day-8 skript: commitlar sonini chiqaradigan skript.
steps: work ичида cb papka:  cd ~/devops/days/day-10/work && mkdir -p cb
cb/gitcount.sh yoz:  cd project && echo "Commits: $(git rev-list --count HEAD)"

tasks.title: Yangi repo qur
steps: mkdir -p vproject && cd vproject && git init && git config user.email v@v.uz && git config user.name v

tasks.title: Tarix yarat (3 commit)
steps: vproject ичида 3 marta: fayl yarat/o'zgartir → git add . → git commit -m ...
Masalan:  echo v1 > app.txt && git add . && git commit -m c1   (keyin v2, v3)

tasks.title: Feature branch + merge
tasks.why: Loyiha yakuni: feature tarmog'ида ishlab, asosiyga merge.
steps: echo yangilik > feature.txt && git add . && git commit -m feature

tasks.title: Kun xulosasi
steps: git add va git commit farqini + branch nima uchun kerakligini ustozга ayt
